title: Backend Developer Vacancy at mfine - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at mfine - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
mfine invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About mfine:
mfine is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine!
